examples.title: Use Case Approach
examples.description: Identify and describe the functional requirements of a system from the user's perspective.
examples.code:
IDENTIFY use cases
ANALYZE use cases
DOCUMENT use cases
REFINE use cases
TEST use cases
examples.explanation: The use case approach involves identifying, analyzing, documenting, refining, and testing use cases to ensure that the system meets the functional requirements of the user.

examples.title: Use Case Diagram
examples.description: A graphical representation of the use cases and actors in a system.
examples.explanation: A use case diagram is a graphical representation of the use cases and actors in a system, showing the relationships between them.

examples.title: Use Case Scenario
examples.description: A description of the sequence of events that occurs during a use case.
examples.code:
def use_case_scenario(sequence_of_events, pre_conditions, post_conditions):
  print('Sequence of Events:', sequence_of_events)
  print('Pre-conditions:', pre_conditions)
  print('Post-conditions:', post_conditions)
examples.explanation: A use case scenario describes the sequence of events that occurs during a use case, including the pre-conditions and post-conditions.
